name: golden-workflow-augment
description: IP-agnostic workflow-level patches to fl-model-gen that lift FL emission to true golden authority (T1/T2/T4)

items.content: Remove name-heuristic state autoincrement in emit_fl_model.py::_apply_primary
items.detail: Lines 884-892 of emit_fl_model.py rely on substring matches in state names to fabricate state updates. Replace with: when SSOT does not define output_rules/state_updates for the transaction, return RESP_SLVERR with kind='unsupported_transaction' and emit [SSOT QUESTION] state_updates undefined for transaction <id>.
items.criteria:
Name-heuristic block removed
Unsupported transactions return RESP_SLVERR with explicit [SSOT QUESTION] payload
fl_model_check.json::passed remains true on all currently-passing IPs after patch

items.detail: Lines 208-209 silently fill 4 fake refs when the only module has no SSOT refs. Replace with blocked=true and blocker='SSOT module ownership undefined'.
items.criteria:
Auto-fill block removed
IPs with single module and no refs are flagged blocked rather than silently passing

items.activeForm: Patching coverage closure to require transaction match
items.detail: _coverage_closure_goals currently uses _primary_transaction_contract (transactions[0]) to fabricate a contract for every orphan bin. Replace with name-matching scan; if no transaction matches, emit blocked closure goal with blocker='no executable transaction matches coverage bin'.
items.criteria:
transactions[0] forced default removed
Orphan bins without matching transaction are blocked, not silently bound

items.content: Move generated_at/timestamp out of payload into model/manifest.json
items.detail: decomposition.json, fcov_plan.json, fl_model_check.json, equivalence_goals.json all include generated_at making outputs non-deterministic. Move all wall-clock fields into <ip>/model/manifest.json (host, run_id, generated_at) and keep payloads byte-stable.
items.criteria:
Two consecutive runs of emit_fl_model.py + emit_equivalence_goals.py produce byte-identical decomposition.json/fcov_plan.json/fl_model_check.json/equivalence_goals.json
manifest.json contains the wall-clock fields

items.detail: run_self_check currently only checks transaction RESP_OKAY. Add: invariants_evaluated counter (every invariant evaluated for every applied txn), reset_consistency check (after reset, state == state_defaults), error_case_triggered set (each tx.error_cases entry intentionally fired). fl_model_check.json gains invariants_evaluated, invariants_failed, reset_consistency, error_cases_covered fields.
items.criteria:
fl_model_check.json::self_check has new keys: invariants_evaluated, invariants_failed, reset_consistency, error_cases_covered
fl_model_check.passed=false when any invariant fails or reset is inconsistent
Golden TODO GLD_AUG_SELF_CHECK validator checks invariants_evaluated >= len(invariants)

items.detail: Implemented by workflow/fl-model-gen/scripts/emit_model_signature.py. Hooks: emit_fl_model.py invokes emit_model_signature() at end so signature is always fresh.
items.criteria:
<ip>/model/model_signature.json exists after emit_fl_model.py run
Keys: schema_version, ip, ssot_hash, transactions_hash, invariants_hash, expressions_hash
--check mode returns 0/1 to detect drift

items.content: Add semantic-change gate to tb-gen / sim-debug / rtl-gen workers
items.activeForm: Wiring model_signature gate into downstream workers
items.detail: On worker entry, read <ip>/model/model_signature.json and compare against last-known. If mismatch, emit [SSOT HANDOFF] golden_changed -> human and stop. Stored last-known signature lives in <ip>/model/.signature.lock.
items.criteria:
Each downstream worker has the gate
Mismatch triggers [SSOT HANDOFF] golden_changed and exits non-zero
Match lets work proceed silently

items.content: Add determinism property test apply(seq) == compose(apply(prefix), apply(suffix))
items.detail: Generate N random transaction sequences from SSOT vocabulary; verify FunctionalModel.apply on the full sequence equals applying prefix then suffix on a fresh model. Non-determinism (e.g. dict key ordering, non-stable trace) breaks this.
items.criteria:
fl_model_check.json includes determinism_property: passed/failed
N >= 50 sequences sampled
Any failure roots into a [SSOT QUESTION] for the offending transaction

items.detail: When humans confirm an FL output for a (txn, expected_result) pair, append to <ip>/model/golden_vectors.jsonl. emit_fl_model.py replays the file at the end of every run; any divergence flags [SSOT HANDOFF] golden_regression -> human.
items.criteria:
<ip>/model/golden_vectors.jsonl is read on every emit
Any mismatch fails fl_model_check.passed
fl_model_check.json::self_check has golden_vectors_replayed and golden_vectors_failed fields

items.content: Stable trace canonicalization (key sort, deterministic dict order)
items.detail: Today FunctionalModel.trace appends raw dict snapshots; key order can drift across Python builds. Wrap with a canonical_dict() that sorts keys recursively, so `hash(trace)` is reproducible. Same treatment for state snapshots.
items.criteria:
Trace dump is byte-identical across two runs of run_self_check on the same SSOT
Canonicalization helper added to functional_model.py template
fl_model_check.json includes trace_hash matching across runs
